hero.subtitle: Outlay keeps every subscription in one view, counts down each renewal, and warns you before money leaves your account — so nothing bills you by surprise.

mock.renewsIn: renews in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} · {date}

features.heading: Built to make recurring spend impossible to ignore.

see.title: See every subscription in one place
see.body: From streaming to software to that gym app you forgot about — every recurring charge lands on one calm dashboard. Nothing hidden, nothing slipping through.

notify.title: Get notified before you're charged
notify.body: A heads-up lands in time to cancel, pause, or plan — never the morning after.
notify.alert: {name} renews in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} — {price}

hikes.title: Catch price hikes early
hikes.body: Outlay flags the moment a subscription quietly raises its price.

spend.title: Know exactly what you're spending, every month
spend.body: One clear monthly total, broken down per subscription and trended over time. The true cost of your recurring spend, never a surprise.

how.heading: Three steps to never being surprised by a renewal.
how.step1Body: Enter the services you pay for — name, price, and billing cycle. Bulk-add the obvious ones in seconds.
how.step2Body: We keep each renewal date in view and quietly count down to the next charge across all your subscriptions.
how.step3Title: Get a heads-up before you pay
how.step3Body: A timely notification lands before each renewal — cancel, pause, or plan around it before the money moves.

free.heading: Free to use. Every feature included.
free.body: outlay is completely free — no plans, no card, no limits. Track everything from day one.

cta.heading: Take control of your recurring spend.
cta.body: See every subscription, catch every renewal, and stop paying for things you forgot about.

footer.tagline: Every recurring charge, always visible. Get product updates as we ship.
footer.copyright: © {year} <link>Petr Vorlíček</link>. Crafted with attention to detail.
footer.madeFor: Made for people who hate surprise charges.

newsletter.helper: Product updates. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.error: Please enter a valid email address.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to see every renewal at a glance.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start tracking every subscription in minutes — it's free.
auth.name: Name
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
auth.errorSignIn: Wrong email or password. Please try again.
auth.errorSignUp: Couldn't create your account. That email may already be in use.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.verifySubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it to verify your account.
auth.errorVerify: That code is wrong or expired. Please try again.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
auth.resetVerifySubtitle: Enter the code we sent to {email} and choose a new password.
auth.codeResent: A new code is on its way.
auth.errorReset: Couldn't reset your password. Check the code and try again.
auth.panelBody: Join outlay and stop letting renewals catch you off guard.
auth.panelPoint1: Every subscription on one calm dashboard
auth.panelPoint2: A heads-up before each renewal charges
auth.panelPoint3: Price-hike alerts and clear spend trends
auth.panelFooter: Made for people who hate surprise charges.

renews.inDays: Renews in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

overview.subtitle: Here's where your recurring spend stands today.
overview.attentionClearBody: No urgent renewals or price changes right now.

empty.title: No subscriptions yet
empty.body: Add your first subscription to start tracking renewals and spend.

onboard.title: See where your money goes
onboard.body: Add a service and Outlay shows your true monthly spend and warns you before every charge.
onboard.quickAddHint: Each adds at a typical price. Edit or remove anytime.

chart.estimate: Real monthly spend — this month updates live

help.trend: Real monthly spend. This month updates live as you add or change subscriptions; past months are locked snapshots.
help.normalized: Yearly and weekly plans are converted to a monthly figure, so every subscription compares fairly.

form.name: Service name
form.pickHint: Choose from the list or type your own.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Where your recurring money goes.
insights.trendSubtitle: Normalized monthly spend across the last 7 months.
insights.breakdownSubtitle: Share of your monthly spend, biggest first.
insights.hikesSubtitle: Subscriptions that quietly raised their price.
insights.empty: Add a subscription to see insights.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and notifications.
settings.name: Name
settings.notifSubtitle: Decide when Outlay gives you a heads-up.
settings.leadTimeHint: How far ahead of a charge to remind you.
settings.priceHikeHint: Get told the moment a subscription raises its price.
settings.weeklyHint: A Monday recap of upcoming renewals and spend.
settings.dangerSubtitle: Sign out or remove your account.
